name: Hotel Booking
alternateName: Hotel booking demand datasets (Data in Brief, 2019)
description: This dataset contains 119,390 observations of hotel bookings for a city hotel and a resort hotel, with arrival dates between 1 July 2015 and 31 August 2017. It includes both bookings that effectively arrived and bookings that were canceled. All data elements identifying the hotels or customers were removed by the original authors. Four columns — name, email, phone-number and credit_card — were artificially generated by the Kaggle uploader and are NOT real. The data is originally from the article 'Hotel Booking Demand Datasets' by Nuno Antonio, Ana Almeida and Luis Nunes (Data in Brief, Volume 22, February 2019).

spatialCoverage.name: Portugal (one city hotel and one resort hotel)

contributor.name: Mojtaba
contributor.description: Kaggle user who uploaded this version of the dataset

citation.name: Hotel booking demand datasets
citation.author: Nuno Antonio, Ana de Almeida, Luis Nunes

measurementTechnique: Bookings extracted from the Property Management Systems (PMS) of two hotels in Portugal. Personally identifying fields were anonymised by the original authors. The Kaggle uploader additionally generated synthetic (non-real) values for name, email, phone-number and credit_card columns.

variableMeasured.name: hotel
variableMeasured.description: Hotel type: 'City Hotel' (66%) or 'Resort Hotel' (34%)

variableMeasured.name: is_canceled
variableMeasured.description: 1 if the booking was canceled, 0 otherwise

variableMeasured.name: lead_time
variableMeasured.description: Days between booking entry date and arrival date

variableMeasured.name: arrival_date_year
variableMeasured.description: Year of arrival (2015–2017)

variableMeasured.name: arrival_date_month
variableMeasured.description: Month of arrival (January–December)

variableMeasured.name: arrival_date_week_number
variableMeasured.description: ISO week number of arrival (1–53)

variableMeasured.name: arrival_date_day_of_month
variableMeasured.description: Day of month of arrival (1–31)

variableMeasured.name: stays_in_weekend_nights
variableMeasured.description: Number of Saturday/Sunday nights booked

variableMeasured.name: stays_in_week_nights
variableMeasured.description: Number of Monday–Friday nights booked

variableMeasured.name: adults
variableMeasured.description: Number of adults

variableMeasured.name: children
variableMeasured.description: Number of children

variableMeasured.name: babies
variableMeasured.description: Number of babies

variableMeasured.name: meal
variableMeasured.description: Meal type (BB, HB, FB, SC, Undefined)

variableMeasured.name: country
variableMeasured.description: Country of origin (ISO 3166 3-letter code); 177 unique values, most common PRT (41%)

variableMeasured.name: market_segment
variableMeasured.description: Market segment designation. 'TA' = Travel Agents, 'TO' = Tour Operators

variableMeasured.name: distribution_channel
variableMeasured.description: Booking distribution channel (TA/TO, Direct, Corporate, GDS, Undefined)

variableMeasured.name: is_repeated_guest
variableMeasured.description: 1 if the guest is a repeat customer, 0 otherwise

variableMeasured.name: previous_cancellations
variableMeasured.description: Number of previous bookings cancelled by the customer

variableMeasured.name: previous_bookings_not_canceled
variableMeasured.description: Number of previous bookings not cancelled by the customer

variableMeasured.name: reserved_room_type
variableMeasured.description: Code of the room type reserved (anonymised)

variableMeasured.name: assigned_room_type
variableMeasured.description: Code of the room type assigned (may differ from reserved)

variableMeasured.name: booking_changes
variableMeasured.description: Number of changes made to the booking

variableMeasured.name: deposit_type
variableMeasured.description: No Deposit / Non Refund / Refundable

variableMeasured.name: agent
variableMeasured.description: ID of the travel agency that made the booking (anonymised)

variableMeasured.name: company
variableMeasured.description: ID of the company responsible for the booking (anonymised)

variableMeasured.name: days_in_waiting_list
variableMeasured.description: Number of days on the waiting list before confirmation

variableMeasured.name: customer_type
variableMeasured.description: Transient / Transient-Party / Contract / Group

variableMeasured.name: adr
variableMeasured.description: Average Daily Rate = sum of all lodging transactions / total staying nights

variableMeasured.name: required_car_parking_spaces
variableMeasured.description: Number of car parking spaces required by the customer

variableMeasured.name: total_of_special_requests
variableMeasured.description: Number of special requests made by the customer (0–5)

variableMeasured.name: reservation_status
variableMeasured.description: Check-Out / Canceled / No-Show

variableMeasured.name: reservation_status_date
variableMeasured.description: Date at which the last reservation_status was set

variableMeasured.name: name
variableMeasured.description: Guest name — SYNTHETIC, not real (added by Kaggle uploader)

variableMeasured.name: email
variableMeasured.description: Guest email — SYNTHETIC, not real (added by Kaggle uploader)

variableMeasured.name: phone-number
variableMeasured.description: Guest phone number — SYNTHETIC, not real (added by Kaggle uploader)

variableMeasured.name: credit_card
variableMeasured.description: Credit card number — SYNTHETIC, not real (added by Kaggle uploader)
